claim: Statistical analysis showing the text was generated by a stochastic random process, supporting the hoax hypothesis
evidence_against: Methodology contested. Subsequent work by Amancio et al. (2013) and Montemurro & Zanette (2013) found long-range statistical patterns consistent with natural language, contradicting pure randomness.

tests_run.details: Methodology contested. Subsequent work by Amancio et al. (2013) and Montemurro & Zanette (2013) found long-range statistical patterns consistent with natural language, contradicting pure randomness.

reasoning: Historical attempt by Andreas Schinner (2007). Cipher type: random generation (hoax). Proposed language: none (meaningless).
source: Schinner, A. 'The Voynich Manuscript: Evidence of the Hoax Hypothesis' (Cryptologia, 2007)
